label: Transparent nudibranch motif
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: transparent cutout source for a Morphous design-system catalog motif
Primary request: Create a vivid sea slug nudibranch motif on a perfectly flat solid chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: A single elegant nudibranch form with curled organic body, saturated orange mantle, electric-blue rhinophores and ridges, clean white speckles, and restrained violet edge accents. The silhouette should feel expressive, modular, and suitable for a gallery design-system mascot.
Composition: isolated centered subject with generous padding, crisp edges, no cropping.
Background: one uniform removable chroma-key color only, no shadows, gradients, texture, floor plane, reflection, lighting variation, text, watermark, random logo, extra animals, or coral scenery.

label: Light expressive gallery system board
prompt: Create a wide 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for Sea Slug, motif nudibranch form, category mollusk, biome coral reef, mood expressive gallery system. Use electric blue, saturated orange, clean white foam neutrals, dark reef ink, sea-foam surfaces, and restrained violet edge accents. Include readable sections for Palette, Typography, Navigation, Dashboard, Charts, Table, Form, Status, Components, Spacing, Radius, Shadows, and Texture. Show a gallery-style product dashboard with sidebar navigation, top toolbar, cards, charts, sortable table, search, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, loading, empty, and error states. Include English and Japanese typography samples. Avoid generic blue-purple gradients, unrelated colors, random brand names, watermark, and tiny illegible labels.

label: Dark expressive gallery system board
prompt: Create the dark-mode companion board for Sea Slug, motif nudibranch form, category mollusk, biome coral reef, mood expressive gallery system. Translate the light board into dark reef ink and deep ocean surfaces with electric-blue active states, saturated orange highlights, clean white foam text and speckles, sea-foam contrast panels, and restrained violet edge accents. Include readable sections for Palette, Typography, Navigation, Dashboard, Charts, Table, Form, Status, Components, Spacing, Radius, Shadows, and Texture. Show a dark gallery dashboard with sidebar navigation, top toolbar, cards, charts, sortable table, search, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, loading, empty, and error states. Include English and Japanese typography samples. Avoid generic blue-purple gradients, unrelated colors, random brand names, watermark, and tiny illegible labels.
